---
title: "Canada_Goose_DataExplore"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

library(forecast)
library(Kendall)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(smooth)
library(zoo)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyr)


```


## Reading the data


```{r}

goose_monthly <- read_csv("./Data/Cleaned_bySpecies/CanGoose_Monthly_withObserver.csv")
goose_daily <- read_csv("./Data/Cleaned_bySpecies/CanGoose_Daily_withObserver.csv")

#creating the month column/ filtering dates for 10 years
goose_monthly <- goose_monthly %>% 
  mutate(month = month(ymd(date))) %>% 
  filter(date >= as.Date("2015-01-01") &
         date <= as.Date("2025-01-01"))

goose_daily <- goose_daily %>% 
  mutate(month = month(ymd(date))) %>% 
  filter(date >= as.Date("2015-01-01") &
         date <= as.Date("2025-01-01"))


```

## Plotting the data


```{r}

# Montly Plots
ggplot(goose_monthly, aes(x = date, y = mean_obs)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Canada Goose Observations Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean Observations"
  )+
  theme_bw()

ggplot(goose_monthly, aes(x = date, y = mean_observers)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Canada Goose Observers Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean Observers"
  )+
  theme_bw()


### Daily Plots

ggplot(goose_daily, aes(x = date, y = sum_obs)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Canada Goose Observations Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean Observations"
  )+
  theme_bw()

ggplot(goose_daily, aes(x = date, y = sum_observers)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Canada Goose Observers Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean Observers"
  )+
  theme_bw()

```

## Summary Statistics


```{r}

ggplot(goose_monthly, aes(x = as.factor(month), y = mean_obs))+
  geom_boxplot()


ggplot(goose_monthly, aes(x = as.factor(month), y = mean_observers))+
  geom_boxplot()


```

## ACF and PACF

```{r}


ts_goose_monthly <- ts(goose_monthly$mean_obs, start = c(2015, 1), frequency = 12)

autoplot(ts_goose_monthly)

ts_goose_cleaned <- tsclean(ts_goose_monthly)

autoplot(ts_goose_monthly, series = "Original Data")+
  autolayer(ts_goose_cleaned, series = "Cleaned Data")+
  xlab("Time")+
  ylab("Monthly Average Observations (Birds)")

```
```{r}
ts_goose_cleaned %>% stl(s.window = 12) %>%
  autoplot()

```
```{r}

Acf(ts_goose_cleaned, lag.max = 40)
Pacf(ts_goose_cleaned, lag.max = 40)

```






```{r}

auto_model <- auto.arima(ts_goose_cleaned)
auto_model


fit_212 <- auto.arima(
  ts_goose_cleaned,
  seasonal = FALSE,
  xreg = fourier(ts_goose_cleaned, K = c(2, 12))
)

```
